name: Guild Mage

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Glory to the Guild
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card or drain a (soulstone). If it does so, a friendly model within 6" heals 2.

actions.name: Rule of Law
actions.effects: This model may remove a marker within 2" of the target to deal +1 damage.

triggers.name: Spellbind
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (shield) abilities.

actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp.

actions.name: Healing Energy

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.
